textByHashes.09c8e3c822ae939e6aef5c2953604d14769bf317: Excuse me! This area is different than the rest of the Wilderness, are you sure you understand the rules?
textByHashes.ba9d05a519077254935b931e3b7938de82c8a8b3: I can tell you everything you need to know, but if you're in a rush then be warned my overlords will NOT be happy if they find you to be fighting with no honour.
textByHashes.108cd9576a593802d4f516fb5bc5d83b3e00146f: Just don't go doing anything silly like selling your soul to your opponent else there will be big trouble!
textByHashes.81a6412c5de999ea945e8720748408d3dfb8cb30: How may I help you, sir?
textByHashes.4c616d073ab4e2675d6bffca4fa081b6b63af243: How may I help you, madam?
textByHashes.719d83af9217ddc0eb1f0201cc93f12930d80534: Sure. Which part do you want to learn?
textByHashes.660fb42843e9fe45af3fd1d875c1432a65d6183d: Sure. Upon entering the arena, you will be assigned a Target based on your combat level, and if you wish to adjust the range of potential Targets, you may do so by speaking with the Trader.
textByHashes.d6d3d1987531e0227751c84c4f8308f7d9cc7a7c: If you wish to change your Target, you may skip your current one, but please note that if you skip three skulled Targets within 30 minutes, you will not be able to receive a new Target for the next 30 minutes.
textByHashes.0d2e5500ac36b0e12b2fa150c911e0d911f0bb39: Additionally, it's worth mentioning that killing a player who is not your Target will not reward you with any bonuses related to Emblem or Bounty Hunter Points.
textByHashes.ddae3beb7b3b1abdc348f41b64843ec6bcd55f3a: After defeating your Target, you may come across a tier one Emblem. Defeating another Target will level up the Emblem; the higher its tier, the greater its value.
textByHashes.a3545884a94b3d60e8cb6d7a43859908d251b742: If you die while carrying an Emblem, its tier will be reduced by one. If you die with a Tier 1 emblem, you will lose the emblem.
textByHashes.044a3c1b36120d4a4234a3dc231c255d1ea24541: You may use Bounty Hunter Points to purchase a tier one Emblem from the Trader, or sell your own Emblem to him for Bounty Hunter Points. You can only have one Emblem at a time.
textByHashes.5ee2d34dfd033a7c6c00994006763fdb28fbd0d1: You can earn Bounty Hunter Points by defeating your target or selling Emblems to the Trader. Once you have Bounty Hunter Points, you may use them to purchase rewards from the reward shop.
textByHashes.b39c9884320b86ec9df80a5fbdf20c5a0c29347f: To participate in Bounty Hunter, you must have a certain amount of coins in your Coffer, which varies based on your combat level. Currently you need at least coins to participate.
textByHashes.bcdeac94f8f2a53e724e410479fb43cf7428bee0: If you are unskulled and another person kills you in Bounty Hunter, coins will be deducted from your Coffer and given to your killer.
textByHashes.db359e686a5432b19890e6257d82724702711cd0: If you are skulled, 10,000 coins will be deducted from your Coffer and given to your killer. However, any surplus money in your Coffer will remain safe.
textByHashes.fa2bea3b5a28ab87b72fd29b60248f9793818f22: To manage your Coffer, talk to the Trader.
textByHashes.29ef30bf25a86a743de7161bd428d827d19e3421: Well, if you want crates, you'll need to be fighting a target in the arena while having a minimum value of risked items on you. Anything you can protect, we won't count.
textByHashes.d68d97aa04b60f69bbe75b6c1d3c616c87a692f1: If you meet these requirements, we'll keep track of how long you're in there for. We'll occasionally give you a bonus if you die as well.
textByHashes.8c7c8f5ad6f1f7ccb19c2de217f5d881f624ad80: When you kill a target, if you've been in long enough, you'll get a crate. If you've been in there longer, you'll get a higher value crate.
textByHashes.1d9042ab96a821d8643913f4f8783409e2d9ae67: The crates don't contain anything special; just coins and supplies to help cover what you'll use in the crater.
textByHashes.017c0dc628147c6fda77d43dce5e32ef30572b2e: If you keep killing your target, you probably won't get many high value crates, but you'll certainly get a lot more points and Emblems instead.
textByHashes.d5c6780d779140d7551aababd72db56265bb5608: Of course. Just show me the armour and I'll get it done.
textByHashes.1f63171a09f5875a978334dc858a8472595c674d: Ah yes, you'll be able to collect them from me, once you've got some targeted kills that is.
textByHashes.193fda2608dedf71a230509de541ed3123501f0a: Ah yes! I've been told to hold onto some hats for you, for your uhm... deeds in the wilderness.
textByHashes.1fa95f591617b1be813091885ad1fee62158b10f: I'm afraid you've already got one of those hats, I can't let you have another.
textByHashes.100b9b985d56a9457e865eb35e78a441382bf2e0: I'm afraid you've got nowhere to put a hat if I gave one to you.
textByHashes.b4d73176b22a79d6f8b05b70958cf435ebedc182: Of course. Your current EP value is %.
textByHashes.8370e4c1f3a67e537fae1247c5b50dbe31c0ee93: Beyond this portal lies Daimon's Crater, a place where you'll fight other adventurers like yourself for glory and rewards.
textByHashes.c90da6425ffc80d7c99acd8a4a6865e523cec13b: Sadly, I can't let you into Daimon's Crater right now.
textByHashes.3ede613bc584e989a89b596bc95254730d251b2e: If you step through this portal, you'll be taken to Daimon's Crater, where we've set up a lobby area for you to ready yourself for combat.
textByHashes.1de5344827670abffb872a6b9ff8cd27d6cffdc6: If you'd like, I can explain the rules of Bounty Hunter to you.
textByHashes.89fd975b8734337a78ffbf13474baef99fc69894: Certainly. Would you like to add or remove coins from it?
